title: pgRDF LUBM baseline (TF-12 schema lock)
description: Per-fixture record of validate-mode behaviour + perf signals at LUBM-N. Correctness fields are exact-match in CI; timing fields are tolerance-compared per the per-fixture `comparison_tolerance` block. Schema locked at v0.6 cycle entry per TF-12 intake.

schema_version.description: Bump when fields are added/removed/renamed. Consumers refuse to parse unknown versions.

produced_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at the moment the runner emitted the report.

produced_by.description: Identifier of the runner that emitted the file (e.g. 'tests/perf/run-lubm.sh@host', 'ci.yml/regression', '<pg-major>'). Used for diff context when comparing baselines.

univ_count.description: LUBM university count this baseline was generated at.

pgrdf_version.description: Semver of the pgRDF extension under test (e.g. '0.5.9').

modes.description: One sub-record per validate-mode (SHACL fixtures only) OR a single 'default' sub-record for non-SHACL fixtures.

elapsed_ms_pct.description: Per-fixture tolerance percentage on elapsed_ms. CI runner noise floor is ~50% on small fixtures; tighter on substantial ones. Correctness fields (conforms, violations) are ALWAYS exact-match — this tolerance applies only to timing.

conforms.description: SHACL only. NULL on engine error (e.g. parse). EXACT-MATCH gate.

elapsed_ms.description: End-to-end validate / sparql / materialize time. Tolerance-compared per fixture.

plan_cache_hits.description: From pgRDF's plan cache instrumentation. Diagnostic field; not a gate criterion (cache behaviour is environment-dependent).

dict_lookups.description: Dictionary lookups during the run. Diagnostic field; not a gate criterion.

error.description: Engine error message if the run errored. When present, conforms is null and the entire mode row is informational only.
